name: Seed Blessing
description: The town blesses the season's first seeds and shares planting tips.

name: Glowtide Night
description: A lantern-lit night market along the shore as the tide glows.

name: Harvest Fair
description: A harvest market with stalls, contests, and shared meals.

name: Frostlight Festival
description: Warm cider and lanterns against the longest nights of the year.
